description: Model must simultaneously call an inventory check and a shipping estimator in a single turn. The two calls are independent — neither result feeds the other. Tests batching of operationally related but computationally independent tool calls.
prompt: A customer wants to order 2 units of SKU 'PRD-4471-BLK' and ship them to postcode SW1A 1AA. Each unit weighs 1.2 kg. Check inventory availability and get a shipping estimate at the same time.

toolDefinitions.name: check_inventory
toolDefinitions.description: Returns the current stock level for a product SKU, optionally scoped to a specific warehouse.

warehouse_id.description: Optional warehouse filter. If omitted, returns aggregate stock across all warehouses.

toolDefinitions.name: estimate_shipping
toolDefinitions.description: Calculates an estimated shipping cost and delivery window for a given destination and parcel weight.

destination_postcode.description: UK postcode for the delivery address, e.g. 'SW1A 1AA'.
